infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: PneumoScan needs Bluetooth to connect to the lung sound wearable device.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PneumoScan needs microphone access to record cough sounds for analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PneumoScan uses location to detect community outbreak clusters.
